Detailed Description

template<typename Visitor>
struct sprite::detail::BinaryVisitor< Visitor >

A helper for implementing the binary form of the visit function. This uses the unary visit to resolve each abstract Node argument step-by-step.

Definition at line 101 of file visit.hpp.
